name: Decadent French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the butter, brown sugar, and Karo syrup until bubbly.
2. Pour into a 13x9 baking dish and sprinkle generously with chopped pecans.
3. Arrange 2-inch slices of French bread over the mixture.
4. Beat together eggs, milk, and vanilla extract.
5. Pour over the bread and refrigerate overnight.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes, then invert the pan.
7. Serve with whipped cream and sliced strawberries. A nonstick pan makes life easier; watch closely to avoid burning.
Note: This recipe can be made up to a day in advance.
